findingDetails.title: Review configuration under-scopes the declared production command and prompt surface
findingDetails.claim: The review cannot certify the declared 37-command/37-prompt surface because its immutable scope list contains only 28 command paths and 9 prompt paths.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: The parent specification may intentionally exclude deep-loop control-plane commands and agent_router.md.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: The seven-family parent scope accounts for the 28 configured commands, but the review contract and sync-prompts generator expose a 37-source surface and the config includes only nine prompt mirrors.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Add all 37 sources and 37 prompt mirrors, or document an explicit exclusion and separate coverage owner before claiming full-surface review.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Filesystem census plus sync-prompts exclusion rules produced 37 production command sources and 37 prompt outputs; the configured reviewScopeFiles count is 28 commands and 9 prompts.
findingDetails.recommendation: Reconcile reviewScopeFiles with the generator surface before later dimension verdicts.

findingDetails.title: Representative agent validation emits a non-sequential numbering warning
findingDetails.claim: The representative agent validator passes with a non-blocking section-number warning.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: A full agent sweep may show this warning is an intentional shared convention or a representative-only anomaly.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: The validator may permit section zero as a legacy or adapter marker while retaining exit 0.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Full agent validation shows the warning is canonically allowed or absent outside this representative file.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Required representative invocation only; full agent sweep is reserved for the correctness pass.
findingDetails.recommendation: Confirm the create-agent canon for section zero and either remove the warning or document the exception.

findingDetails.title: Review matrix conflates seven-family canon scope with 37-source prompt parity

findingDetails.title: Parent completion criteria still require home prompt installation that child 003 defers
findingDetails.recommendation: Reconcile parent and child contracts before claiming the parent handoff criterion is satisfied.

findingDetails.recommendation: Make the settings policy explicit for deep-alignment.

findingDetails.recommendation: No packet-local change; retain the documented shared-validator follow-up.

findingDetails.title: Read-only deep-alignment is emitted with a workspace-write sandbox
findingDetails.scopeProof: The canonical manifest denies write/edit/patch, while the generator maps allowed Bash to workspace-write and the generated TOML confirms the result.
findingDetails.claim: A read-only deep-alignment agent is granted workspace-write by the Codex generator.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: The omitted historical entry could be intentional, but the fallback and generated artifact both prove workspace-write.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Only if the runtime ignores sandbox_mode or does not expose Bash.

findingDetails.title: Generated-output writers follow pre-existing symlinks outside their nominal output roots
findingDetails.scopeProof: Both writers construct output paths and call writeFileSync without lstat, realpath containment, or no-follow semantics.
findingDetails.claim: A pre-existing output symlink can redirect generation outside the nominal output root.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: No current links exist, but that does not constrain a future checkout or user-created link.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Only if the invoking runtime guarantees non-symlink roots and destinations.

security.sync_writers: fail: destination writes are not symlink-safe
security.agent_permissions: fail: deep-alignment is generated workspace-write despite write/edit/patch denial
security.validator: pass: --type is allowlisted; no unsafe deserializer or code execution path
security.prompt_forwarding: pass: $ARGUMENTS is rendered as data; no shell/eval/exec
security.secrets: pass: targeted secret-pattern scan returned no matches
security.home_install: not_present: home install and stale-link repair are explicitly deferred

integrationEvidence.result: workspace-write confirms the historical-settings fallback consequence
home install is deferred; no installer exists in reviewed scripts

edgeCases: No current symlink entries exist in the inspected source/output trees; the latent writer weakness remains.
Source discovery does not recurse through symlink directories because it relies on Dirent.isDirectory()/isFile().
validate_document.py intentionally accepts a caller-supplied file path; --type is constrained by argparse choices.
P2-002 is refined to P1-004 because the omission changes an effective sandbox boundary.

ruledOut.evidence: No shell execution or eval/exec path consumes generated prompt content.
sync-agents uses bounded scalar extraction and JSON encoding, not YAML deserialization or arbitrary property copying.
Reviewed header/TOC patterns have no catastrophic nested quantifiers.
No home-install implementation exists; packet marks it operator-deferred.
